name: Black Steel Greatshield
description: Black Steel Greatshield is a Greatshield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Greatshield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Black Steel Greatshield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Greatshields weigh a decent amount and provide the best protection in the game. Greatshields provide a greater value of blocking and protecting oneself from enemy and boss attacks but greatly increases the weight and reduces the player's mobility. This type of shield works best at reducing damage or guarding instead of parrying.
location:
The Black Steel Greatshield can be found at the following location: 
 Dropped by Black Knight Garrew that can be found by Fog Rift Fort. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Link]

name: Golden Lion Shield
description: Golden Lion Shield is a Medium Shield in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Golden Lion Shield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Medium Shields feature a good balance between defense and weight, which is great for most situations in combat. Although it may not be as light as a Small Shield which is good for agility and parrying, the Standard Shield works best at reducing damage and blocking.
location:
The Golden Lion Shield Shield can be found at the following location: 
 Shadow Keep: Given by Redmane Freyja after you hand her over the Letter for Freyja, received from Sir Ansbach. [Map Link][Video Location]

name: Messmer Soldier Shield
description: Messmer Soldier Shield is a Medium Shield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Medium Shield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Messmer Soldier Shield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Medium Shields feature a good balance between defense and weight, which is great for most situations in combat. Although it may not be as light as a Small Shield which is good for agility and parrying, the Standard Shield works best at reducing damage and blocking.
location:
The Messmer Soldier Shield can be found at the following location: 
 Has a 2.00% chance to be dropped by Messmer Soldiers, from shield-wielding Messmer Soldiers. Found in camps across Gravesite Plain and Scadu Altus, and inside Castle Ensis and Shadow Keep.

name: Serpent Crest Shield
description: Serpent Crest Shield is a Medium Shield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Medium Shield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Serpent Crest Shield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Medium Shields feature a good balance between defense and weight, which is great for most situations in combat. Although it may not be as light as a Small Shield which is good for agility and parrying, the Standard Shield works best at reducing damage and blocking.
location:
The Serpent Crest Shield can be found at the following location: 
 Can be obtained by completing the Incursion Painting Puzzle. [Elden Ring Map]. 
 To complete this puzzle, travel to the Greatbridge North Site of Grace, and head straight West until you can see the large bridge leading into Belurat Tower Settlement in the Distance. You can see the specific location in the Shadow of the Erdtree Map. Approach the ghost and you will be rewarded with the Serpent Crest Shield.

name: Shield of Night
description: Shield of Night is a Small Shield in Elden Ring. It was added with the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Shield of Night is a Shield that scales primarily with Dexterity. Small Shields usually weigh very little and has the least form of protection from attacks. They are often used by players who prefer Parrying rather than Blocking. Its lighter weight also makes it ideal for quick, agile characters with low equipment weight capacity.
location:
The Shield of Night can be found at the following location: 
 Can be found in Bonny Gaol. The top level of this gaol can be accessed after using the jar lift near the bridge twice. You need to jump off at the bridge level, activate the switch, and then ride the jar going up. You will find this on the ledge behind the corpse on top of a table. [See SOTE Elden Ring DLC Map] [Video Link]

name: Smithscript Shield
description: Smithscript Shield is a Small Shield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Small Shield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Smithscript Shield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength,  Intelligence and Faith. Small Shields usually weigh very little and has the least form of protection from attacks. They are often used by players who prefer Parrying rather than Blocking. Its lighter weight also makes it ideal for quick, agile characters with low equipment weight capacity.
location:
The Smithscript Shield can be found at the following location: 
 Taylew's Ruined Forge: Jump from the opening left to the lever, and instead of heading forward turn left. There are two Golem Smiths there, one that uses fire. Once defeated, stick to the right and go up to the upper platform using the crumbled column. You will find the item at the end of the hallway. Beware of the fire blob that falls from the ceiling.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Verdigris Greatshield
description: Verdigris Greatshield is a Greatshield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Greatshield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Verdigris Greatshield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Greatshields weigh a decent amount and provide the best protection in the game. Greatshields provide a greater value of blocking and protecting oneself from enemy and boss attacks but greatly increases the weight and reduces the player's mobility. This type of shield works best at reducing damage or guarding instead of parrying.
location:
Moore drops Verdigris Greatshield wherever he's killed, which can be: 
 If you kill a Forager Brood Pest, Moore will invade you and will drop this when killed 
 If you tell Moore "Remain sad forever", you can find this on his corpse by the Forager Brood Pest north of the Church of the Crusade [Map Link] 
 If you tell Moore "Put it behind you", you can find this on his corpse after fighting him as part of the Leda and Allies Boss fight [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Wolf Crest Shield
description: Wolf Crest Shield is a Medium Shield in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Medium Shield in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. The Wolf Crest Shield is a Shield that scales primarily with Strength. Medium Shields feature a good balance between defense and weight, which is great for most situations in combat. Although it may not be as light as a Small Shield which is good for agility and parrying, the Standard Shield works best at reducing damage and blocking.
location:
The Wolf Crest Shield can be found at the following location: 
 Can be found in: Castle Ensis. Located inside a storeroom you'll find a treasure chest that has the Wolf Crest Shield. In the courtyard where you fight Moonrithyll, Carian Knight there is a gap in the wall in the northwest corner which leads downstairs to the storeroom.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]
